title: SIGGRAPH 2026 Best Paper Award
detail: Walk on decomposed subdomains awarded one of five best paper awards at SIGGRAPH 2026 among 1120 submitted papers.

title: NSERC Postdoctoral Research Award
detail: Awarded $70,000 per year for two years; declined.

title: SIGGRAPH Asia Best Paper Honorable Mention
Activision Blizzard Academic Gift
detail: Awarded $30,000 to pursue research during Ph.D. studies.

title: Gerry Heckman Scholarship
detail: Awarded $5,000 to outstanding fourth-year Electrical and Computer Engineering undergraduate students.

title: NSERC Undergraduate Student Research Award
detail: Awarded $6,000 to pursue research during undergraduate studies.

title: George Dufault Award
detail: Awarded $300 for the best work term report in the computer engineering class.

title: Developer 30 Under 30 Award
detail: Recognized for building the infrastructure behind Canada's technology companies.

title: 3× First in Class Engineering Scholarship
detail: Awarded $500 each for ranking at the top of the Electrical and Computer Engineering cohort in 1B, 2A, and 3A terms.

title: Observer of Canada
detail: Led Team Canada at the 9th International Olympiad on Astronomy and Astrophysics (IOAA); team earned a bronze medal and two honourable mentions.

title: IOAA Silver Medal
detail: 8th International Olympiad on Astronomy and Astrophysics (IOAA), Suceava, Romania.

title: NOAA Gold Medal
detail: 10th National Olympiad on Astronomy and Astrophysics (NOAA), Tehran, Iran.
